cv.name: Maria Varagilal
cv.title: Senior Technical Product Designer · Design Engineer
cv.summary: Lead Frontend Designer with 10+ years transforming product experiences across B2B SaaS — from strategy through to production. Sole design lead across a multi-product portfolio: I own the full design lifecycle, mentor contributors, and when the design is approved, I build it. A designer who ships — no handoff required.
cv.note: Currently using AI to accelerate design-to-code workflows, from exploration and prototyping to production-ready components.

securibox.position: Lead Technical Product Designer & Frontend Developer
description: Led end-to-end design strategy and vision: shaped product experience, UI/UX design, information architecture, and brand identity across a multi-product B2B SaaS portfolio.
Drove design across multiple products in parallel, owning tailored workflows end-to-end and working directly with backend engineers.
Reviewed work across teams, mentored designers through problems without obvious answers, and guided them toward better decisions independently.

Architected intuitive product flows, content organization, and complex enterprise workflows from discovery to delivery — including UI for configuring, displaying, and managing 500+ integrations, divergent sync statuses, GDPR compliance, and French payslip regulations..
Designed interfaces in design tools, then built them directly into production code using React, Redux, Vite, Gatsby, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS — no handoff to a separate frontend team.
Built fully responsive, accessible, and performant UIs following WCAG standards.
Partnered daily with engineering teams on API integration, technical architecture decisions, feature implementation, and shipping high-quality code.
Balanced strategic design leadership with deep technical execution in a fast-paced, product-driven environment.
Leveraged AI tools to accelerate design-to-code workflows while maintaining design quality and engineering standards.
Led design execution on client-facing digital projects, coordinating with developers and account managers from brief to delivery.
Designed and developed graphic concepts, proposals and projects for mobile and web apps.
Produced social media campaigns, visual assets, and interactive experiences.
Development of projects internally and externally. The tasks include developing graphic concepts, designing brochures, guides, roadmaps, and digital and paper infographics.
Development of proposals and projects for mobile and web app.
Design and development of editorial pages for magazines TV GUIA and FLASH

home.description: Frontend Designer. Coherent multi-product experiences from concept to production — product experience, strategy, UI/UX, and the Maria Varagilal Playbook Method.

about.quote: Do it with passion, or not at all.
about.description1: Energetic by nature and licensed in Design — during the undergraduate degree the passion for digital took hold. From there, a career built on owning the full path from concept to production.
about.description2: From concept to production — bridging design and code with JavaScript, modern frameworks, Redux, and clean UI development to turn ideas into full experiences that are thought through, built out, and ready to perform.
